content:
```yaml
Layout:
Type: Vertical Stack with Floating Elements
Zones:
TopZone (15% height):
- Avatar State Indicator (morphing shape/face)
- Emotional Climate Bar (gradient visualization)
- Active Metrics Toggle (3-dot menu)
MiddleZone (60% height):
- Message History (scrollable)
- Avatar Responses (left-aligned bubbles)
- User Messages (right-aligned bubbles)
- Contextual Annotations (inline cards)
BottomZone (25% height):
- Input Field (expanding text area)
- Quick Actions Bar (5-7 contextual buttons)
- Voice Input Toggle
- Attachment Options (scenarios/images)
FloatingElements:
RTMOverlay:
Position: Top-right corner
Type: Collapsible card
Content: Live metrics graphs
ConsentDialog:
Position: Center modal
Type: Progressive disclosure
context: From document: # Platform-Agnostic UI Architecture: Project Evolve — chunk 9 (chunk 9/10)
